blended.narrative: Shanty Creek is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 4" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
